subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the greatness and the grandeur, the glory and the power, and the bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الکبریاء و العزه و القدره و الالاء
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
